title: perilla frutescens var. typica
intro: Perilla frutescens var. typica, also known as Kka-Ni or Japanese perilla, is a variety of the Perilla frutescens plant, a species of plant in the mint family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Perilla frutescens var. typica include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as potentially helping to manage symptoms of conditions such as asthma and allergies. Herbal preparations of Perilla frutescens var. typica include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
